title: OXIRACETAM
description: Oxiracetam is a racetam nootropic known for its stimulating cognitive enhancement. It improves memory, focus, and logical thinking while providing mild stimulation. Often considered the 'speedy' racetam.

research.title: Co-administration of Nanowired Oxiracetam and Neprilysin with Monoclonal Antibodies to Amyloid Beta Peptide and p-Tau Thwarted Exacerbation of Brain Pathology in Concussive Head Injury at Hot Environment
research.summary: Heat exposure worsens concussion-related brain injury. Combining oxiracetam with specific antibodies and enzymes significantly enhanced neuroprotection under elevated temperatures.

research.title: Safety, tolerability, and pharmacokinetics of oral (S)-oxiracetam in Chinese healthy volunteers
research.summary: The (S)-oxiracetam variant was safe and well-tolerated in healthy Chinese participants, demonstrating favorable absorption and dose-proportional exposure.

research.title: Oxiracetam in dementia: a double-blind, placebo-controlled study
research.summary: Over 12 weeks, oxiracetam improved quality of life and specific cognitive domains compared to placebo, though some participants experienced mild adverse events.

research.title: Oxiracetam in the treatment of primary degenerative and multi-infarct dementia
research.summary: Among 289 participants with various dementia types, oxiracetam treatment produced measurable improvements on dementia rating scales with minimal adverse effects.

research.title: Oxiracetam in the treatment of multi-infarct dementia and primary degenerative dementia
research.summary: Testing on 73 patients demonstrated significant word fluency improvements in both patient groups, though daily functioning declined in primary degenerative dementia cases.

research.title: Effects of Oxiracetam and Physical Activity in Preventing Post-Stroke Cognitive Decline
research.summary: Oxiracetam did not meaningfully prevent post-stroke cognitive decline, whereas regular exercise maintained cognitive performance and improved quality-of-life measures.

research.title: Bone Marrow Stromal Cells Combined with Oxiracetam Influences the Expression of B-cell Lymphoma 2 in Rats with Ischemic Stroke
research.summary: Combining bone marrow stromal cells with oxiracetam enhanced neurological recovery in stroke-affected rats by increasing protective protein expression and reducing cell death.

sentiment.summary: Users appreciate its focus-enhancing and mildly stimulating effects. Popular for studying and work requiring logical analysis. More stimulating than piracetam.

effects.label: Consistent Effects:
effects.description: Reliable cognitive enhancement for most users.

effects.label: Choline Synergy:
effects.description: Works best with adequate choline intake.

dosage.label: With Food:
dosage.description: Can be taken with or without food.

sideEffects.label: Insomnia:
sideEffects.description: May disrupt sleep if taken late.

availability.label: Prescription in Europe:
availability.description: Available by prescription in some countries.
